content.en:
Another hundreds of thousands of time passed, and Ye Tian cultivated the Great God Arithmetic and several Great Divine Powers to the extreme level, and once again possessed several Extreme Great Divine Powers, and his strength increased a little more.

However, at this level, no matter how many extreme supernatural powers Ye Tian practiced, his strength would not be improved too much, after all, the gap between the extreme supernatural powers was not too big, even if he practiced many extreme supernatural powers, it was impossible to release all the extreme supernatural powers at once, and it also required a door to perform, so he could not transform his strength.

Even letting Ye Tian practice the Great Divine Power ranked first among the three thousand Great Divine Powers only made his strength improve by a small margin.

"The Extreme Divine Power is not enlightened for the time being, let's find a way to exchange it for the Chaos Divine Power!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Points are needed to exchange for Chaos Powers, and his points are not many, many resources have been exchanged, and even obsidian gold is not much left.

In desperation, Ye Tian entered the purple light world again.

He was going to collect more resources in the Purple Light World, but what he never expected was that the resources of the Purple Light World were running out.

Purple Lin Yi and other things that can resist the purple light allow many strong people to enter and leave the purple light world at will, so many gods and heavenly monarchs poured into the purple light world, collecting resources on a large scale, so that the resources of the purple light world are almost scarce, and it will take a long time for new resources to be born.

As a result, the originally rich world of purple light has now become a world with poor resources.

"If you don't have resources, you won't have points, and it's difficult to exchange for Chaos Divine Power!"

Ye Tian frowned.

Of course, he can use time to survive.

As a Daozi of the Void Heaven, he will have a reward of tens of thousands of points every million years, tens of millions of years is equivalent to having 100,000 points, and 100 million years is equivalent to having a reward of 1 million points.

That's a lot of points for everyone else!

Therefore, the Daozi of the Void Heaven One Pulse does not lack points at all, there is no shortage of resources, and it is enough to cultivate step by step.

But Ye Tian couldn't wait that long, it was impossible for him to spend 100 million years to impact the combat power of the nine-star peak god general, that speed was too slow.

Therefore, he must collect enough resources to redeem points and make himself progress quickly.

Next, Ye Tian sent many Terran elites to various places in the Great Universe to help him collect information and places rich in resources.

Many places in the entire universe are great treasures, but they can't be explored, and there may be many places that are comparable to the purple light world, or even surpass the purple light world.

In short, the newly promoted universe is full of resources and opportunities.

......

One day 5,000 years later.

Ye Tian received a message, which was passed on by a certain exploration team of the Terran race.

"Found a treasure spot?"

Ye Tian was not excited, in the past few thousand years, the human race has indeed found a lot of treasure land, but those treasure lands are relatively treasure land.

For example, for ordinary gods and heavenly monarchs, it is a real treasure land, but for him, it is very ordinary, and all the resources are worth thousands of points at most.

It wasn't of much use to him.

For Ye Tian, a treasure land that can harvest tens of thousands of points at one time is a real treasure land.

This exploration team sent a message, and Ye Tian naturally didn't ignore it, and quickly rushed over.

After all, if he really found the treasure land, if he didn't go, wouldn't he regret it!

-----------

"This is it!"

Ye Tian descended on a continent and saw the exploration team of the human race.

This is an exploration team composed of earth-honored powerhouses, and the leader is a one-star god general.

"I've seen Renzu!"

The Terran powerhouses said respectfully.

Human Ancestor is Ye Tian's title in the Human Race now, after all, the Human Race is now able to surpass other races and become the strongest race, which is completely due to Ye Tian.

In addition, Ye Tian brought the most perfect inheritance and cultivation path to the human race from the Void Heaven Palace, and was respected as the ancestor of the human race by later generations.

"You guys get out of this continent first, it's too dangerous here, it's not a place for you to stay!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Yes!"

The members of the exploration team nodded their heads.

Although they had only just entered this continent, they had also seen the dangers of this continent, there were too many earth-honor-level creatures, they were everywhere, and there were many creatures comparable to the Heavenly Monarch.

If it weren't for some life-saving things, they would have died a long time ago.

However, they still found many precious treasures, and they were everywhere, which is enough to prove that this continent is very precious and valuable.

After the Terrans left, Ye Tiancai really seriously explored the situation on this continent.

"The resources are indeed very rich, and many elixir spirit plants are even helpful to the Heavenly Monarch!"

Ye Tian was very excited.

This continent is not small, and with so many resources accumulated, it is also an unimaginable wealth.

Immediately, Ye Tian turned into thousands of people and began to continuously collect the resources of this continent.

Earth-level creatures are in the way, kill!

Destiny Realm creatures are in the way, kill!

With Ye Tian's strength, ordinary Heavenly Mandate Realm creatures were completely no different from ants, unless it was a very powerful Heavenly Mandate Realm creature that was enough to defeat Ye Tian.

But not long after the birth of the Great Universe, many creatures with strong bloodlines were also difficult to grow up quickly, and most of them were in the early or middle stage of the Heavenly Destiny Realm, and they couldn't threaten Ye Tian at all.

With the passage of time, Ye Tian collected too many resources, and his net worth skyrocketed.

this day.

Ye Tian came to a certain mountain range in this continent and suddenly discovered an astonishing situation.

"Source Stone Vein !!"

Ye Tian sensed a strong source stone aura and was under the mountain range.

The source stone is a very precious resource, and it is also a kind of currency for the strong above the Heavenly Mandate Realm, but in fact, even the Heavenly Monarch does not have many source stones, and the highest grade source stone becomes the source stone of creation.

It is rumored that the Creation Source Stone can create a true ancestor of the Great Dao realm, and it can also merge the two universes into a great universe.

Creation source stones are too rare, but source stones are not so rare, but they are also very valuable.

The source stone can assist in cultivation, can also assist in the Great Dao of Enlightenment, and can even be used to heal injuries.

It can be said that the source stone is a universal energy stone.

If a vein of source stone appeared in the chaos, it would be enough to cause two great forces to fight.

"There is an active stone exchange record in the Void Sky Vein, 1 source stone is worth 10 points, this is the price of ordinary source stones, but I don't know how many source stones there are in this source stone vein?"

Ye Tian immediately began to mine.

He also knew that if this source stone vein was conceived for a few hundred million more years, more source stones might be born, but by that time, he estimated that he would not be able to occupy it, and it would definitely be occupied by other forces.

Now, taking advantage of the fact that other forces don't know, he takes the lead in digging and digging up the source stone, which really belongs to him.

Dig!

Dig!

Dig!

Ye Tian became a miner, digging every day and night, and one by one the source stones fell into Ye Tian's hands.

The entire vein is not large, and in just half a month, Ye Tian hollowed out this vein.

And the harvest is unimaginably huge!
